query:
INSERT INTO memory (
                    uuid,
                    person_uuid,
                    content,
                    embedding,
                    summary,
                    emotional_score,
                    retrieval_summary,
                    summary_first_person,
                    people_names,
                    people_uuids,
                    subject_tags
                )
                VALUES (
                    $1::UUID,
                    $2::UUID,
                    $3::TEXT,
                    $4,
                    $5::TEXT,
                    $6::INT,
                    $7::TEXT,
                    $8::TEXT,
                    $9::TEXT[],
                    $10::UUID[],
                    $11::TEXT[]
                );
